---
title: "Poster at CBMS Conference"
date: 2025-09-24
description: "I'll be presenting my newest work in structure-exploiting machine learning in a poster at the [CBMS conference in Houston](https://www.math.uh.edu/cbms-amml/index.shtml) this December."
---

I'll be presenting my newest work in structure-exploiting machine learning in a
poster at the [CBMS conference in Houston](https://www.math.uh.edu/cbms-amml/index.shtml) this December.
